articles.title: An Engineering Roadmap Toward Completely Neural Computers (Meta AI, KAUST)
articles.summary: A new technical paper, “Neural Computers,” was published by researchers at Meta AI and KAUST. Abstract “We propose a new frontier: Neural Computers (NCs) — an emerging machine form that unifies computation, memory, and I/O in a learned runtime state. Unlike conventional computers, which execute explicit programs, agents, which act over external execution environments, and world models, which learn environment dynamics, NCs aim to make the model itself the running computer. Our long-term goal is the Completely Neural Computer (CNC): the mature, general-purpose realization of this emerging machine form, with stable execution, explicit reprogramming, and durable capability reuse. As an initial step, we study whether early NC primitives can be learned solely from collec
articles.title_zh: 邁向完全神經計算機的工程路線圖（Meta AI、KAUST）
articles.summary_zh: Meta AI和KAUST的研究人員發表了新技術論文「Neural Computers」，提出將計算、記憶和I/O統一在學習運行時狀態中的新興機器形式。

articles.title: This accessory lets you play Switch 2 games on your iPad or iMac display at 4K resolution
articles.summary: Apple has included excellent display panels on iMacs for years, but for the longest time, there hasn’t really been a way to use it for anything other than macOS. There used to be a feature called Target Display Mode, but it’s long been discontinued. This has been a shame, since plenty of iMacs have excellent displays that go to waste after the compute is outdated. I’ve found a pretty good solution though, and it involves a 4K capture card and one nifty app available on the Mac App Store. Any HDMI input, whether that be a Switch 2, PS5, Xbox, or something else – can display on your iMac (or USB-C iPad!) more…
articles.title_zh: 這款配件讓你在 iPad 或 iMac 顯示器上以 4K 解析度遊玩 Switch 2 遊戲
articles.summary_zh: Apple 多年來在 iMac 上配備了優秀的顯示面板,但長期以來卻缺乏除了 macOS 以外的用途。雖然曾有 Target Display Mode 功能,但已早已停用。

articles.title: These are the best new MacBook deals right now: April 2026 Buyer’s Guide
articles.summary: In the era of Apple Silicon, MacBooks are more affordable than ever. Nowadays, you can buy a MacBook Air with 512GB of storage and 16GB of memory for $1099 directly from Apple, when such a configuration would’ve cost $1599 just a few years ago. And on top of that, we have MacBook Neo bringing the entry-point down substantially. Even with Apple’s prices coming down though, there’s still a number of deals to be found out there if you look just a little. more…
articles.title_zh: 現在最優惠的 MacBook 交易:2026年4月購買指南
articles.summary_zh: 在 Apple Silicon 時代,MacBook 變得比以往更加實惠,你現在可以直接從 Apple 購買配備 512GB 儲存空間和 16GB 記憶體的 MacBook Air,僅需 $1099,而幾年前這樣的配置需要 $1599。

articles.title: Xiaomi Watch S4 41mm hands-on
articles.summary: Introduction The Watch S4 may very well be Xiaomi's most popular watch yet. Our S4 review's popularity can attest to that. But while the full-sized S4 was focused on customizability, the Watch S4 41mm is locked in on being elegant. It's also quite feminine in both design and size. The 41mm model isn't strictly speaking a women's watch, but it is close enough. We found the watch too small for even the most slender of male wrists here at GSMArena HQ. Ours is the Sunset Gold model, and it's the most special of the Watch S4 41mm models. You also have a choice of Black, White, and...
articles.title_zh: Xiaomi Watch S4 41mm 親手體驗
articles.summary_zh: Watch S4 可能是 Xiaomi 最受歡迎的智慧手錶。而 41mm 款式相比注重客製化的全尺寸 S4,更著重於優雅設計,在外觀和尺寸上也呈現出相當女性化的特色。

articles.title: HPA-managed workloads: Why the obvious waste stays
articles.summary: Teams running Kubernetes can usually see where they’re overprovisioned. Requests are higher than they need to be, there’s consistent headroom, and capacity sits underused.  This has been true for a while, but it is showing up more often now as more teams run burstier model-serving workloads on Kubernetes and start feeling the cost of overprovisioning more directly.  But those workloads don’t get touched.  This shows up most with HPA-managed services. The inefficiency is obvious; as the HPA scales, the waste scales with it. What’s less obvious is what happens when you change it.  These workloads already scale under real production traffic. Teams have watched how they behave during spikes,
articles.title_zh: HPA 管理的工作負載：為什麼顯而易見的浪費仍然存在
articles.summary_zh: 運行 Kubernetes 的團隊通常能看到他們過度配置的地方，requests 高於實際需求、始終存在額外容量且容量利用不足。隨著越來越多團隊採用 Kubernetes，這個問題變得更加普遍。

articles.title: Hands-on with Belkin’s newest 25W compact MagSafe docks for iPhone and Android users
articles.summary: Belkin has just released two excellent new Qi2.2 chargers – providing 25W MagSafe charging in an ultra-compact design. Normally, these products are centered around the Apple ecosystem, but Belkin’s new 3-in-1 actually embraces modularity and gives Android users an option to bring their own watch charger. Both are very slim, and work excellently no matter which ecosystem you’re in. more…
articles.title_zh: Belkin 最新 25W 迷你 MagSafe 充電座動手玩 – iPhone 和 Android 使用者皆適用
articles.summary_zh: Belkin 推出兩款全新 Qi2.2 充電器，提供 25W MagSafe 充電功能與超迷你設計；新款 3-in-1 支援模組化設計，Android 使用者可自行搭配手錶充電。

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold7 now costs more in the US
articles.summary: The Samsung Galaxy Z Fold7, unveiled last July, is expected to get a successor in a few months, so one would expect it to get a price cut to make it a more attractive option for potential buyers. However, if you live in the US and are planning to buy the Galaxy Z Fold7, you'll actually have to spend more, as this 2025 Galaxy foldable has received a price hike in the US. The Samsung Galaxy Z Fold7 has three storage options in the US - 256GB, 512GB, and 1TB, which were launched at $2,000, $2,120, and $2,420, respectively. With the revised pricing, the 512GB model now costs $2,200, while the...
articles.title_zh: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold7 美國售價上漲
articles.summary_zh: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold7 於去年七月發布，預期數月內將推出後續機型，然而美國消費者若計畫購買 Galaxy Z Fold7 實際上需要花費更高的費用。

articles.title: China Unveils Taiwan Goodwill Steps After Rare Opposition Talks
articles.summary: China announced a series of policy measures to demonstrate “goodwill” toward Taiwan on Sunday, following a landmark meeting between President Xi Jinping and Taiwan opposition leader Cheng Li-wun.

articles.title: Philippines Asks Facebook to Curb Fake News, Warns of Legal Move
articles.summary: The Philippine government has asked Meta Platforms Inc., the parent company of Facebook, to implement measures to curb the spread of “false and panic-inducing content” on its platforms, warning of possible legal action if the company fails to act swiftly.

articles.title: Google’s Tensor G5 is ‘good enough’ — but 2026 flagships are leaving the Pixel 10 behind
articles.summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qn_m9KKXjus In one hand, I hold the Xiaomi 17 Ultra — a powerhouse driven by Qualcomm’s benchmark-dominating Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 . In the other, Google’s Pixel 10 Pro XL, powered by the latest Tensor G5 chip. On paper, Google’s latest flagship looks far less impressive in terms of raw performance, a fact Pixel fans have just come to accept over the years and one that’s a constant thorn in the side of those who love a bit of mobile gaming every now and again. But benchmarks don’t always tell the full story — we seldom notice the extra 5% or 10% difference while browsing the web or scrolling feeds. Likewise, modern Android games aren’t always built to push cutting-edge silicon to its limits, and real-world performance often depends just as much on optimiz
articles.title_zh: Google Tensor G5 已『足夠好』——但 2026 年旗艦機正在將 Pixel 10 甩在身後
articles.summary_zh: 一手是搭載高通 Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 的小米 17 Ultra，另一手是搭載最新 Tensor G5 晶片的 Google Pixel 10 Pro XL，紙面上 Google 最新旗艦機的表現看起來遠不如對手。

articles.title: South Korea’s telecom giants surprise 7 million users with unlimited, universal internet — net access declared a 'basic telecommunications right,' 400 Kbps data after monthly plans run out
articles.summary: South Korea's Ministry of Science and ICT said that the country’s three major carriers will provide more than seven million mobile subscribers with unmetered 400 Kbps data.
articles.title_zh: 南韓電信巨頭驚喜為700萬用戶提供無限通用網際網路——網路存取宣佈為「基本電信權利」，月度方案用盡後提供400 Kbps數據
articles.summary_zh: 南韓科學和ICT部表示，該國三大電信商將為超過700萬手機用戶提供無計費400 Kbps數據服務。

articles.title: Valve engineer shocks Linux community with game-changing VRAM hack for 8GB GPUs — breakthrough solution turbocharges gaming by prioritizing VRAM for games while background tasks take a back seat
articles.summary: Natalie Vock, a dev on Valve's Linux graphics driver team has introduced new fixes that optimize VRAM usage for games in Linux. Previously, any background task could make the OS evict game data from VRAM and throw it into system memory, but now it'll be able to correctly prioritize the game running in foreground.
articles.title_zh: Valve工程師震撼Linux社群推出革命性VRAM黑科技——突破性解決方案通過優先為遊戲分配VRAM來大幅提升遊戲性能
articles.summary_zh: Valve Linux圖形驅動團隊開發者Natalie Vock引入新的修復方案，優化Linux中遊戲的VRAM使用，使系統能夠正確優先考慮運行的遊戲，而不是讓後台任務佔用VRAM。

articles.title: If you care about privacy, these are the Google Keep alternatives to switch to
articles.summary: Credit: Megan Ellis / Android Authority Not all note-taking apps are created equal when it comes to privacy. Google Keep , for example, isn’t as private as you may think. Sure, the chances of someone hacking into your account are minimized thanks to things like 2FA, but people seem to forget that Google has full access to the contents of their account. I guess one could argue that it’s not a big deal, especially if your Keep account doesn’t store anything sensitive, like medical or financial records. Besides, Google has strict privacy guidelines, so it’s not like its employees are reading your notes during their lunch break — I hope. Still, the company can access your data if it wants to, so you have to trust that it won’t do it randomly on a slow Tuesday. It will, however, hand over your
articles.title_zh: 如果你關心隱私，這些是值得轉換的 Google Keep 替代品
articles.summary_zh: 並非所有筆記應用程式在隱私方面都相等。Google Keep 可能不如你想像的那麼隱私，雖然雙因素認證等功能可以最小化帳戶被駭的風險，但人們往往忽視 Google 對數據的收集。

articles.title: I tested the Galaxy S26 and S26 Ultra for weeks. Here’s why the Ultra is worth the extra money
articles.summary: The Samsung Galaxy 26 and Galaxy S26 Ultra are polar opposites. Only a few things, such as the Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 chipset and One UI 8.5, tie the two models together. I’ve long been a fan of compact and thin phones; I spent my own cash on both the Galaxy S25 Edge and the iPhone Air, and I haven’t used an “Ultra,” “XL,” or “Pro Max” model as my daily driver in years. I’m not the target audience for the Galaxy S26 Ultra, but I can’t help but love it anyway. I used both the 6.3-inch Galaxy S26 and the 6.9-inch Galaxy S26 Ultra for weeks, and spent some time using the two models side-by-side. For the first time, the bigger Galaxy S26 Ultra offers enough upgrades over the base model to justify the larger footprint and higher price.
articles.title_zh: 我測試了 Galaxy S26 和 S26 Ultra 數週，以下是 Ultra 值得額外付費的原因
articles.summary_zh: Samsung Galaxy S26 和 Galaxy S26 Ultra 是截然不同的產品。只有 Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 晶片和 One UI 8.5 等少數功能將兩款機型綁在一起，我長期以來一直喜歡緊湊輕薄的手機。

articles.title: After being an iPhone user for 13 years, here’s why I’m finally switching to Android for good
articles.summary: I’ve been an iPhone user since the iPhone 5c, and switching to Android was never part of the plan — not even in my wildest dreams. I was deeply invested in Apple’s ecosystem, and I loved it to bits. It was the kind of experience where everything just clicked, especially features like AirDrop, which made moving files between my devices feel effortless. But beyond that, the perfect experience started to feel a little less perfect. I began noticing a pattern. iPhones have a habit of catching up to features Android has had for years, and that habit has become harder to ignore. That’s when curiosity got the better of me, and I started using a few Android phones. Somewhere along the way, I realized I was reaching for my Android handsets more than I expected.
articles.title_zh: 作為 13 年的 iPhone 用戶，這是我最終轉換到 Android 的原因
articles.summary_zh: 我從 iPhone 5c 開始就一直是 iPhone 用戶，轉換到 Android 從未在計畫中。我深深投入在 Apple 生態系統中，特別喜歡 AirDrop 等功能帶來的無縫體驗。

articles.title: Google Pixels just got a voicemail feature I’ve wanted for months — here’s how to use it
articles.summary: Ever since it debuted on the Pixel 10 series last August, Take a Message has quickly become one of my favorite recent Pixel features. Essentially Google’s modern take on the voicemail box, Take a Message answers missed calls for you, shows real-time transcriptions, and makes those transcripts easy to read after the fact on the Phone app’s Home page. It’s great. However, there’s just been one problem with the feature. Take a Message greets callers with a standard “The person you have called is not available, please leave a message after the tone,” with no option to create a custom greeting. Thankfully, that’s no longer the case.
articles.title_zh: Google Pixels 剛剛獲得我期待數月的語音留言功能 — 以下是使用方式
articles.summary_zh: 自去年 8 月在 Pixel 10 系列推出以來，Take a Message 已成為我最喜歡的 Pixel 功能之一。作為 Google 對語音信箱的現代化解決方案，它可以為你接聽未接來電並顯示實時轉錄。

articles.title: Deals: Galaxy A57 and A37 get price cuts, Poco X8 Pro lineup and OnePlus 15 discounted
articles.summary: Samsung recently unveiled its latest A-series phones, the Galaxy A57 and Galaxy A37, and both of them are now available at a discounted price. Meanwhile, the Galaxy S26 and the older Galaxy S25+ have also received price cuts. Other phones from Google, OnePlus, and Xiaomi are also available at a discount on Amazon UK. The Samsung Galaxy A57 and A37 5G are both available with a £50 voucher at checkout and a free pair of Buds3 FE that are worth £129. Samsung Galaxy A57 after £50 off at checkoutfree pair of...
articles.title_zh: 優惠：Galaxy A57 和 A37 降價，Poco X8 Pro 系列和 OnePlus 15 優惠
articles.summary_zh: Samsung 最近推出了最新的 A 系列手機 Galaxy A57 和 Galaxy A37，兩款現已以優惠價格上市。Galaxy S26 和較舊的 Galaxy S25+ 也獲得了降價，Google、OnePlus 和 Xiaomi 的其他手機也有優惠。

articles.title: The Screen Time Maximalists Who Spend an Ungodly Amount of Time on Their Phones
articles.summary: As debates over social media addiction rage, people with extreme screen times tell WIRED they have no plans to cut back.
articles.title_zh: 螢幕時間最大化者：在手機上花費過度時間的人
articles.summary_zh: 儘管社群媒體成癮的辯論不斷，擁有極長螢幕時間的人告訴 WIRED 他們沒有計劃減少使用時間。

articles.title: Mammotion Spino E1 Review: A Budget Pool Bot That Comes Up Short
articles.summary: This compact pool robot keeps its price down, but its performance doesn’t match that of more capable cleaners.
articles.title_zh: Mammotion Spino E1 評測：一款表現不足的預算型池底清潔機器人
articles.summary_zh: 這款小型池底清潔機器人透過較低的價格吸引消費者，但其性能不及功能更強大的清潔設備。

articles.title: The 3 Best Mug Warmers of 2026: Better Than the Ember Mug?
articles.summary: The first rule of coffee is that it must stay hot. After weeks or even years of testing, these are the three coffee warmers that will best keep it that way.
articles.title_zh: 2026 年 3 款最佳杯子恆溫器：比 Ember Mug 更好？
articles.summary_zh: 咖啡的首要規則是必須保持溫熱，經過數週甚至數年的測試，這三款恆溫器能最好地保持咖啡溫度。

articles.title: Tech enthusiast gets Doom to run on a 40-year-old printer controller — ancient Agfa Compugraphic 9000PS came with a Motorola 68020 onboard for fast processing
articles.summary: A TechTuber with a fondness for older hardware has managed to get Doom to run on a 40-year-old print controller.
articles.title_zh: 科技愛好者成功在40年前的印表機控制器上執行 Doom — 古老的 Agfa Compugraphic 9000PS 內建 Motorola 68020 處理器以實現快速運算
articles.summary_zh: 一位喜愛舊型硬體的 TechTuber 成功在 40 年前的印表機控制器上執行了 Doom。

articles.title: Keychron Q6 Ultra 8K Review: 660 hours of battery life at 8 KHz
articles.summary: The Keychron Q6 Ultra 8K is a full-size wireless mechanical gaming keyboard with an 8 KHz polling rate and an impressive 660 hours of battery life at that polling rate. However, its high-profile keycaps and slightly heavy tactile switches weren't our favorite.
articles.title_zh: Keychron Q6 Ultra 8K 評測：8 KHz 輪詢率下電池續航 660 小時
articles.summary_zh: Keychron Q6 Ultra 8K 是一款全尺寸無線機械遊戲鍵盤，具有 8 KHz 輪詢率和令人印象深刻的 660 小時電池續航力，但其高鍵帽設計和偏重的觸覺開關並非最佳選擇。

articles.title: Startup secures $30 million contract to 3D print jet engines for the USAF — company to test and develop small turbojets for drones and long-range weapons
articles.summary: Beehive Industries will test its 3D-printed engines for use by the USAF, which are reportedly cheaper to build, use, and service compared to traditionally manufactured engines.
articles.title_zh: 新創公司獲得 3000 萬美元合約為美國空軍 3D 列印噴氣引擎 — 公司將測試和開發用於無人機和遠程武器的小型渦輪噴氣引擎
articles.summary_zh: Beehive Industries 將測試其 3D 列印引擎供美國空軍使用，據報這些引擎的製造、使用和維修成本均低於傳統製造的引擎。

articles.title: Linux 7.0 enables three new AI-specific keys for keyboards, an apparent expansion beyond the Copilot key — Google authors both the HID spec and the kernel patch
articles.summary: The Linux 7.0 kernel has merged support for three new keycodes intended for a coming wave of laptops with dedicated AI agent keys.
articles.title_zh: Linux 7.0 為鍵盤新增三個 AI 專用按鍵，超越 Copilot 按鍵的擴展 — Google 同時編寫 HID 規範和核心補丁
articles.summary_zh: Linux 7.0 核心已合併支援三個新的按鍵碼，用於即將推出的一波配備專用 AI 代理按鍵的筆記型電腦。

articles.title: $27 platypus PCIe adapter converts half-height GPUs into full-height while adding two M.2 slots for SSDs — enthusiast demos low-profile RTX 4060 with two SSDs thanks to PCIe bifurcation
articles.summary: A Redditor got his hands on this PCIe adapter that does the job of two different ones at the same time. It converts half-height GPUs into full height while adding M.2 slots for storage expansion. All this is possible thanks to PCIe bifurcation, splitting an x16 slot into x8 for the GPU, and two x4 lanes for the SSDs.
articles.title_zh: $27 platypus PCIe 轉接卡將半高 GPU 轉換為全高並新增兩個 M.2 插槽用於 SSD — 愛好者透過 PCIe 分岔演示搭配兩個 SSD 的低功耗 RTX 4060
articles.summary_zh: 一名 Redditor 使用了這款 PCIe 轉接卡，它可同時執行兩個不同轉接卡的功能，將半高 GPU 轉換為全高並新增 M.2 儲存擴充槽，這一切都透過 PCIe 分岔實現。

articles.title: 5 ways this Google Maps AI feature helps avoid tourist traps
articles.summary: Google Maps’ new AI chat tool showed up just in time for my Mumbai trip. I had to plan long commutes from the northern side, where I stayed, to the south, and discover all the must-try places in between. It was the perfect opportunity to test out Ask Maps to its limits — because that’s what Mumbai does to you, too. I’m proud that I made the best of this handy AI feature, and I found some amazing ways to make it work harder for me. Here are a few of those.
articles.title_zh: Google Maps AI 功能幫助避開旅遊陷阱的 5 種方法
articles.summary_zh: Google Maps 新推出的 AI 聊天工具在我的孟買之旅中應時而至。我需要規劃從北邊住所到南邊的長途通勤，並發現沿途必嚐的地點，這是測試 Ask Maps 功能的完美機會。

articles.title: ‘The Audacity’ Is the Broligarchy Takedown You Were Waiting For
articles.summary: AMC’s new black comedy about a manchild tech titan spinning out of control is a skewering Silicon Valley’s billionaire class deserves.
articles.title_zh: 《The Audacity》是你一直在等待的兄弟寡頭統治的諷刺作品
articles.summary_zh: AMC的新黑色喜劇講述一位失控的科技巨頭，對矽谷億萬富翁階級進行了應有的嘲諷。

articles.title: Why Is It So Hard to Fix an Electric Bike? (2026)
articles.summary: Bike shop mechanics have lost fingers and their shirts while repairing ebikes of dubious origins. Make sure yours is repairable and third-party certified.
articles.title_zh: 為什麼修理電動自行車這麼難？（2026）
articles.summary_zh: 自行車店機械師在維修來源不明的電動自行車時失去了手指和信譽，確保你的自行車可維修且通過第三方認證。

articles.title: Best 2-in-1 Laptops (2026): Microsoft, Lenovo, and the iPad
articles.summary: Whether you want a detachable tablet or a laptop screen that spins, these 2-in-1 devices manage to balance being both a tablet and a laptop.
articles.title_zh: 最佳二合一筆記本電腦（2026）：Microsoft、Lenovo 和 iPad
articles.summary_zh: 無論你想要可拆卸平板還是旋轉筆記本螢幕，這些 2-in-1 設備都能平衡平板和筆記本的雙重功能。

articles.title: There’s a Secret Ingredient to Making Luxury Ice at Home
articles.summary: Nice ice is big business, but you can get perfectly clear cubes at home without freezing your assets.
articles.title_zh: 在家製作豪華冰塊的秘密成分
articles.summary_zh: 優質冰塊是大生意，但你可以在家輕鬆製作完美透明的冰塊而不會傷荷包。

articles.title: Leonard Green Nears $3 Billion Deal for Cumming Group, FT Says
articles.summary: Private equity firm Leonard Green and Partners is closing in on an acquisition of Cumming Group, a construction project consultancy firm owned by fellow buyout firm New Mountain Capital, the Financial Times reported.
articles.title_zh: Leonard Green 接近完成對 Cumming Group 的 30 億美元收購交易，英國《金融時報》報導
articles.summary_zh: 私募股權公司 Leonard Green and Partners 即將完成對建築項目諮詢公司 Cumming Group 的收購，該公司由另一家收購公司 New Mountain Capital 擁有。

articles.title: Shock from Iran war has Trump's vision for US energy dominance flailing
articles.summary: In President Donald Trump’s telling, the United States has fuel enough to hover above the chaos that his attack on Iran has triggered in global energy markets. “We’re in great shape for the future,” Trump said in a speech last week, asserting that this nation, as the world’s biggest oil and gas producer, doesn’t rely on the tankers Iran blocked from passage through the Strait of Hormuz for the past month. “We don’t need anything they have.” But the view is much different beneath the service station signs across the country that have flipped to more than $4 per gallon for the first time in four years. Over the past month, US households paid $8.4 billion more for gasoline compared to prices before the war on Iran began, according to a report by Democrats on Congress’ Joint Economic Committee
articles.title_zh: 伊朗戰爭衝擊使川普的美國能源主導願景搖搖欲墜
articles.summary_zh: 在川普總統的說法中，美國燃料充足足以應對他對伊朗的襲擊在全球能源市場引發的混亂；川普在上週的演講中表示「我們未來形勢大好」，聲稱該國作為全球最大的石油和天然氣生產者。

articles.title: Linux lays down the law on AI-generated code, yes to Copilot, no to AI slop, and humans take the fall for mistakes — after months of fierce debate, Torvalds and maintainers come to an agreement
articles.summary: After months of fierce debate, Linus Torvalds and the Linux kernel maintainers have laid down the law on AI-generated code.
articles.title_zh: Linux 對 AI 生成代碼定規則，同意 Copilot、拒絕 AI 垃圾，人類為錯誤埋單—— Torvalds 與維護人員經過數月激烈辯論後達成協議
articles.summary_zh: 經過數月激烈辯論，Linus Torvalds 與 Linux 核心維護人員就 AI 生成代碼制定了規範。

articles.title: Veteran Microsoft engineer says original Task Manager was only 80KB so it could run smoothly on 90s computers — original utility used a smart technique to determine whether it was the only running instance
articles.summary: Dave Plummer used several clever techniques to ensure that Windows Task Manager will always run while cutting the performance hit on your hardware when when it's opened.
articles.title_zh: 微軟資深工程師揭露原始 Task Manager 僅 80KB，以便在 90 年代電腦上順暢運行—— 原始工具採用巧妙技術確定是否為唯一運行的執行個體
articles.summary_zh: Dave Plummer 採用多項巧妙技術確保 Windows Task Manager 始終可運行，同時最小化開啟時對硬體的效能影響。

articles.title: Apple Glasses to sport high-end designs using premium materials, at least four styles in testing
articles.summary: According to Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman, in the latest edition of his Power On newsletter , Apple is actively testing at least four different styles of frames for its upcoming smart glasses project. Apple is counting on its superior design taste to stand out from rivals like the Ray-Man Meta Glasses. The report indicates Apple is evaluating the designs and plans to launch several, in multiple colors, somewhat similar to how it launched a range of different watches when the Apple Watch debuted in 2015 … more…
articles.title_zh: Apple Glasses 將採用高端設計和優質材料，至少四款風格正在測試中
articles.summary_zh: 據 Bloomberg 記者 Mark Gurman 報導，Apple 正在為其即將推出的智慧眼鏡項目測試至少四種不同的鏡框風格，並計劃透過優越的設計品味來與 Ray-Ban Meta Glasses 等競爭對手區別開來。

articles.title: Five refurbished iPhones under $500 that still hold up well in 2026
articles.summary: If you’re trying to buy a new iPhone but don’t quite want an iPhone 17, it can often be hard to find something on a tighter budget. Sure, Apple offers the iPhone 17e at $599 – but not everyone finds that to be a compelling phone. Luckily, there’s plenty of great options if you want to buy used, and I’ll be diving into five great picks for varying needs. more…
articles.title_zh: 五款 500 美元以下的翻新 iPhone，在 2026 年仍然表現出色
articles.summary_zh: 如果你想購買新 iPhone 但預算有限，可以考慮購買翻新機型；儘管 Apple 提供 iPhone 17e 售價 $599，但還有許多優質的二手選項可供選擇。

articles.title: Amazon Has Every Model of the M5 MacBook Air at $150 Off This Weekend
articles.summary: Amazon this week introduced a few new record low prices on the M5 MacBook Air and they're all still available today. You'll find $150 off every model of the M5 MacBook Air on Amazon, with free delivery around April 17 for most models. Note: MacRumors is an affiliate partner with Amazon. When you click a link and make a purchase, we may receive a small payment, which helps us keep the site running. Amazon has the 512GB 13-inch M5 MacBook Air for $949.00 , down from $1,099.00, and the 24GB/1TB model for $1,349.00 , down from $1,499.00. Both of these represent new record low prices for each configuration. $150 OFF 13-inch M5 MacBook Air (512GB) for $949.00 $150 OFF 13-inch M5 MacBook Air (16GB/1TB) for $1,149.00 $150 OFF 13-inch M5 MacBook Air (24GB/1TB
articles.title_zh: Amazon 本週末 M5 MacBook Air 全系列優惠 150 美元
articles.summary_zh: Amazon 本週推出 M5 MacBook Air 的多款新低價，所有型號均享受 $150 優惠，大部分型號可在 4 月 17 日前免費送達。

articles.title: AirPods Weekend Deals Include AirPods Pro 3 for $199.99 and AirPods Max 1 for $399.95
articles.summary: Amazon today has the AirPods Pro 3 available for $199.99 , down from $249.00. This is a match of the all-time low price on the AirPods Pro 3, and it's accompanied by a few AirPods Max 1 and AirPods Max 2 deals we're tracking below. Note: MacRumors is an affiliate partner with some of these vendors. When you click a link and make a purchase, we may receive a small payment, which helps us keep the site running. This model of the AirPods Pro launched in September 2025 and has 2x better Active Noise Cancellation than the previous generation, better audio quality, a revised fit that's meant to improve comfort and stability, Live Translation for in-person conversations, and heart rate sensing for workouts. $49 OFF AirPods Pro 3 for $199.99 If you're hunting for AirPods Max deals,
articles.title_zh: AirPods 週末優惠包括 AirPods Pro 3 優惠至 $199.99 和 AirPods Max 1 優惠至 $399.95
articles.summary_zh: Amazon 今日推出 AirPods Pro 3 降價至 $199.99（原價 $249.00），創造歷史新低，同時還有 AirPods Max 1 和 AirPods Max 2 的優惠活動。

articles.title: Unboxing the vivo X300 Ultra Photography kit
articles.summary: Now that the vivo X300 Ultra is out and selling, you'll also be able to buy its accompanying photography kit. Vivo has gone about things differently than some of its peers. Instead of finding space for a second telephoto camera on the back, the X300 Ultra can extend the reach of its 85mm f/2.7 lens through teleconverter lenses. That's plural, because this year, in addition to the 200mm lens, there's also a 400mm one. Now, these aren't your typical camera lenses, where you get focusing parts and an aperture inside the lens. These are teleconverters, which means that they essentially...
articles.title_zh: vivo X300 Ultra 攝影套件開箱
articles.summary_zh: vivo X300 Ultra 已上市銷售，用戶現可購買其隨附的攝影套件；vivo 採用不同於競爭對手的設計方案，讓 85mm f/2.7 鏡頭可擴展焦距，而非在機身背面增加第二個長焦鏡頭。

articles.title: Cursor, Claude Code, and Codex are merging into one AI coding stack nobody planned
articles.summary: The AI coding tool market was supposed to consolidate. One winner would emerge, developers would standardize around it, and the industry would move forward. Instead, the opposite happened. In the first week of April 2026, Cursor shipped a rebuilt interface for orchestrating parallel agents, OpenAI published an official plugin that runs inside Anthropic’s Claude Code, and early adopters started running all three together. Not as competitors. As layers in a stack that nobody designed but that is assembling itself anyway. The pattern mirrors something developers already know from infrastructure. Nobody runs a single observability tool. You run Prometheus for metrics, Grafana for dashboards, and PagerDuty for alerts. Each tool does one thing well, and the value comes from how they compos
articles.title_zh: Cursor、Claude Code 和 Codex 合併成意料之外的統一 AI 編碼堆棧
articles.summary_zh: AI 編碼工具市場原本預計會整合，但實際情況相反。2026 年 4 月第一週，Cursor 推出了用於協調並行代理的重建介面，而 OpenAI 也在推進類似進展。

articles.title: Apple AI Glasses Will Rival Meta’s With Several Styles, Oval Cameras
articles.summary: Also: The latest on the foldable iPhone.
articles.title_zh: Apple AI 眼鏡將與 Meta 競爭 推出多種款式和橢圓形鏡頭
articles.summary_zh: 此外，最新的可摺疊 iPhone 動向。

articles.title: Lenovo hikes Legion Go 2 handheld gaming PC to almost $3,000 for 2 TB model — Handheld now costs more than AMD's Strix Halo devices despite relatively weaker Z2 Extreme chip
articles.summary: Lenovo has raised the prices of its Legion Go 2 handhelds (with Z2 Extreme) across the board, with the worse offended being the 2 TB model, receiving a 93% hike. It went from $1,480 at launch to a staggering $2,850 in the span of just a few months, while the 1 TB model is now $2,000, up from $1,350 at launch.
articles.title_zh: Lenovo 將 Legion Go 2 掌上遊戲電腦 2TB 版本漲價至近 $3,000 — 儘管 Z2 Extreme 晶片相對較弱，掌上電腦現已超過 AMD Strix Halo 設備價格
articles.summary_zh: Lenovo 大幅調漲 Legion Go 2 掌上電腦（Z2 Extreme 版本）的價格，其中 2TB 型號漲幅最大達 93%，從發售時的 $1,480 跳漲至 $2,850，而 1TB 版本則從 $1,350 漲至 $2,000。

articles.title: Possessing Starlink terminals punishable by death in Iran, country using 'military-grade jamming' against terminals — forced nationwide internet blackout becomes second-longest on record as it passes 1,000 hours offline
articles.summary: Iran's nationwide Internet blackout has crossed the 1,000-hour mark and is now the second longest nation-scale shutdown ever measured.
articles.title_zh: 伊朗將持有 Starlink 終端設備列為死罪，國家使用「軍用級干擾」對抗終端 — 全國網路停運成為第二長紀錄，離線時間已超 1,000 小時
articles.summary_zh: 伊朗全國網路停運已超過 1,000 小時，成為有記錄以來第二長的全國規模斷網事件。

articles.title: Tiny 3-inch cube PCs bring a splash of color to the passive PC market with red, orange, green and blue options — Intel Twin Lake-powered Kubb Mini PCs start at $500
articles.summary: Kubb's colorful and compact 3-inch cube PCs are priced from $500 (€430) with 16GB RAM and 256GB SSDs.
articles.title_zh: 迷你 3 吋立方體 PC 為被動散熱 PC 市場增添色彩，推出紅、橙、綠、藍四色選項 — Intel Twin Lake 驅動的 Kubb Mini PC 起價 $500
articles.summary_zh: Kubb 推出色彩繽紛的 3 吋立方體 PC，配備 16GB RAM 和 256GB SSD，起價 $500（€430）。

articles.title: YouTube Premium is the only streaming service that can get away with price hikes
articles.summary: YouTube confirmed this week that Premium prices are going up for the first time in around three years and, unlike every other streaming service, this is one price hike I’m more than willing to accept. more…
articles.title_zh: YouTube Premium 是唯一能逃脫漲價的串流服務
articles.summary_zh: YouTube 本週證實 Premium 價格將首次上漲，這是近三年來的首次調漲，與其他串流服務不同，這次的漲價我願意接受。

articles.title: From LLMs to hallucinations, here’s a simple guide to common AI terms
articles.summary: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.
articles.title_zh: 從 LLMs 到幻覺：常見 AI 術語簡易指南
articles.summary_zh: AI 的興起帶來了大量的新術語和行話。本文提供了一份詞彙表，解釋了你可能會遇到的一些最重要的詞彙和短語。

articles.title: At the HumanX conference, everyone was talking about Claude
articles.summary: Anthropic was the star of the show at San Francisco's AI-centric conference.
articles.title_zh: 在 HumanX 大會上，每個人都在談論 Claude
articles.summary_zh: Anthropic 成為舊金山以 AI 為中心的大會上的明星企業。
